data.name: Embracing Bulky Objects with Humanoid Robots: Whole-Body Manipulation with Reinforcement Learning

data.description: Embracing Bulky Objects with Humanoid Robots: Whole-Body Manipulation with Reinforcement Learning uses Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO).
Embracing Bulky Objects with Humanoid Robots: Whole-Body Manipulation with Reinforcement Learning studies Whole-Body Control (WBC).
Embracing Bulky Objects with Humanoid Robots: Whole-Body Manipulation with Reinforcement Learning discusses Sim-to-Real Transfer.
